title: Feature Request – Handling New Items That Don't Meet Filter Rules in View

posts.author: wgilad (Gilad Wrobel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Problem Description:
While working with a filtered View in a tasks board, when creating a new item, it doesn’t appear in the View because it doesn’t meet the existing filter rules. The current solution, using the “bring it back” button, doesn’t fully address the issue, as it requires manual intervention and causes frustration and inefficiency.

Feature Suggestion:
There is a need for a solution that allows new items to remain visible in the View even if they don’t immediately meet the filter criteria. Alternatively, there could be an option for automatic assignment that ensures the item fits the filter rules at the time of creation.
